ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Overall risk level of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the asset belongs to */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the asset (e.g., Equity, Fixed Income) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the asset */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "notional_value" REAL /* Notional value of the asset */,
  "shares" REAL /* Number of shares of the asset */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP of the asset */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the asset */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* SEDOL of the asset */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the asset (e.g., country) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the asset */,
  "fx_rate" REAL /* FX rate of the asset */,
  "market_currency" TEXT /* Market currency of the asset */,
  "accrual_date" TEXT /* Accrual date of the asset */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the asset */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the asset (if applicable) */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate of the asset (if applicable) */,
  "yield_to_maturity" REAL /* Yield to maturity of the asset (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_class FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the sector */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_classes" (
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "asset_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset class */,
  "asset_sub_class" TEXT /* Sub-class of the asset class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fx_rates" (
  "fx_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FX rate */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the FX rate belongs to */,
  "fx_rate" REAL /* FX rate value */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the FX rate */,
  "fx_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of the FX rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fx_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fx_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the portfolio */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_profiles" (
  "risk_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk profile */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the risk profile belongs to */,
  "risk_type" TEXT /* Type of risk (e.g., market risk, credit risk, liquidity risk) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the risk */,
  "risk_limit" REAL /* Risk limit for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_profiles_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_alerts" (
  "risk_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk alert */,
  "risk_profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk profile the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_alerts_risk_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_profile_id") REFERENCES risk_profiles ("risk_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance report, risk report) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounting" (
  "accounting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accounting entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the accounting entry belongs to */,
  "accounting_date" TEXT /* Date when the accounting entry was made */,
  "accounting_type" TEXT /* Type of accounting entry (e.g., expense, revenue) */,
  "accounting_method" TEXT /* Accounting method used (e.g., cash basis, accrual basis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accounting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounting_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
